creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
Created attachment 234846
upgrade gotosocial to 0.3.6

Changelog: https://github.com/superseriousbusiness/gotosocial/releases/tag/v0.3.6

Changes to the port itself: we now pull a web assets tar ball from the release via https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#porting-master-sites-n

These assets now also contain the admin interface
